name: snarl-sopi-backend
description: Snarl and Sopi operator backend v5.58: product image resolution report. Records each image source width/height before it is squared to 800x800 (stored size is uniform and useless for spotting grainy images, so source size is what matters). New resolution list in Settings, sorted smallest-first with thumbnails and a tiny/small/ok/good grade, plus CSV export, so small upscaled images can be replaced worst-first. A backfill job measures dimensions for images hosted before this by re-fetching their retained original. Cumulative over v5.57.
